flows.name: Leave apply workflow
flows.notes: Form fields all render. 'Total Days Requested: 0 days' did not update client-side after filling dates — potential UI bug (BUG-W8-03, P2).

flows.name: Attendance check-in
steps: Today's Status heading present (ref_143) with 'No attendance record for today'
Check In button present (ref_145) - did NOT click to avoid persistent data
flows.notes: Widget visible & interactive. Not clicked per instructions.

flows.name: Wiki create page
steps: Click New Page - no visible modal/route change (FAIL)
Click Create Page - still no title input rendered (FAIL)
flows.notes: BUG-W8-01 P1: Both 'New Page' and 'Create Page' buttons on /fluence/wiki do not open a create form (no dialog, no route change). Likely requires a Space to be selected first but no affordance is surfaced. Blocks wiki page creation flow.

flows.name: Expense submit (S2 lifecycle)
steps: main.innerText is empty after 10s wait - page content not rendering (FAIL)
flows.notes: BUG-W8-02 P1: /expenses/reports renders empty main element. No vendor/amount form available — likely backend timeouts (see BUG-W8-04) cascade or route has broken data fetch.

bugs.title: Wiki /fluence/wiki New Page & Create Page buttons no-op
repro: Expected: modal or navigation to page editor with title + content fields
Actual: no visible state change; no dialog/editor appears
bugs.evidence: read_page returned no dialog/title input after click

bugs.title: /expenses/reports main content empty — page does not render
repro: Expected: expense reports list + 'New Expense Report' button

bugs.title: Leave apply 'Total Days Requested' does not update after dates filled
repro: Set Start Date 2026-05-01 and End Date 2026-05-02 via form_input
Expected: 'Total Days Requested: 2 days' (or 1 day incl. end)
Actual: remains '0 days' (may be missing change-event dispatch on programmatic input, or react-hook-form not rebinding)

bugs.title: Multiple /api/v1 endpoints time out at 30s
repro: Open console -> observe 4x [ApiClient] Error: timeout of 30000ms exceeded
